description: Complete UI/UX overhaul - Transform the site from plain dark gray to a vibrant anime-themed design with gradients, animations, neon accents, and modern visual effects. This includes the global styles, layout, header, footer, anime cards, hero section, and all page templates.
steps: Step 1: Overhaul src/app/globals.css - Add anime-themed CSS custom properties (purple/blue/pink/cyan neon palette), gradient utilities, glow effects, animated backgrounds, fade-in keyframe animations, pulse/shimmer effects for loading states, and gradient mesh background classes. Use TailwindCSS 4 @theme inline to define custom colors.

Step 2: Update src/app/layout.tsx - Change the body background from plain bg-gray-950 to a subtle gradient or dark anime-themed background. Add a gradient mesh or animated background element behind the content. Import a more stylish font (e.g., keep Inter but add font-weight variations).

Step 3: Redesign src/components/Header.tsx - Add a gradient border-bottom (purple-to-blue), make the logo text have a gradient color, add a subtle backdrop-blur glass effect, improve nav links with hover underline animations, add a mobile hamburger menu toggle (client component). Make it feel premium/alive.

Step 4: Redesign src/components/Footer.tsx - Add gradient top border, improve layout with better spacing, add subtle background gradient, make links have smooth hover transitions with color shifts, add social-style icons or decorative elements.

Step 5: Redesign src/components/AnimeCard.tsx - Add gradient overlay on hover, improve the card with a subtle glow/shadow on hover (purple/blue neon), add smooth scale transition, improve genre badges with gradient backgrounds, add a subtle animated shimmer loading placeholder, make the score badge more vibrant.

Step 6: Redesign src/app/page.tsx (Homepage) - Create a stunning hero section with animated gradient mesh background, glowing text, and a call-to-action. Improve section headings with gradient text and decorative elements. Add visual distinction between sections (trending gets special treatment). Improve the genre browse cards with emoji + gradient backgrounds. Add a 'Back to Top' button component.

Step 7: Update src/app/anime/[slug]/page.tsx - Add gradient overlays, improve the metadata cards with colored borders/glows, make genre tags more vibrant, improve the guide links section with animated hover effects and gradient borders.
Step 8: Update src/app/anime/[slug]/watch-order/page.tsx - Improve the timeline visual with gradient lines, colored connection dots, better card styling for each entry in the watch order.
Step 9: Update src/app/genre/[genre]/page.tsx and src/app/year/[year]/page.tsx - Add gradient headers, improve section styling consistent with the new theme.
Step 10: Update src/app/not-found.tsx - Make the 404 page visually appealing with gradient text and animated elements.
Step 11: Create src/components/BackToTop.tsx - A floating button that appears on scroll with smooth scroll-to-top behavior (client component with useState/useEffect).
Step 12: Create src/components/LoadingSkeleton.tsx - Animated skeleton placeholder components (card skeleton, text skeleton) with shimmer animation for perceived performance.
acceptance_criteria: The site uses a vibrant anime-themed color palette (purple, blue, pink, cyan gradients and neon accents) instead of plain gray
Hover effects have smooth transitions (scale, glow, color shifts) on cards and links
The hero section has an animated or gradient mesh background
Header has gradient styling, glass effect, and improved navigation
Footer has gradient accents and improved visual hierarchy
AnimeCard has neon glow on hover and gradient overlay effects
A BackToTop button component exists and works
Loading skeleton components exist with shimmer animations
The build completes successfully with no TypeScript errors
verification: Run npm run build and confirm it completes without errors
Check that all new/modified .tsx files have no TypeScript compilation issues
